allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {signWebhook, verifyWebhook} from ''./dist/index.js''; const ts = Math.floor\(Date.now\(\)/1000\); const r = signWebhook\({secret:''s'',payload:''p'',timestamp:ts,nonce:''n''}\); console.log\(''ESM sign:'', r\); const v = await verifyWebhook\({secret:''s'',payload:''p'',signature:r.signature,timestamp:ts,nonce:''n''}\); console.log\(''ESM verify:'', v\);")
